exact_lines_areas_changed: core/risk.py -> get_tp_price(trade): TP computation now caps raw TP at NEAR_RESOLUTION_PRICE
summary: Applied a minimal cap to TP computation so near-1.0 entries cannot produce unreachable TP values above the meaningful near-resolution ceiling.
verification_evidence: Old behavior: get_tp_price(trade) returned entry_px * (1 + AUTO_TAKE_PROFIT_PCT), which could exceed 1.0 for high entry prices (example from log: trade id=259 BUY_NO @ 0.9447).
New behavior: get_tp_price(trade) computes raw_tp and returns min(raw_tp, NEAR_RESOLUTION_PRICE).
